provenance.author: Gemini Code Assist
provenance.context: A semantic capsule describing the founding lore of Wrightrealm.

intent.primary_goal: To provide a machine-readable summary of the mythic-technical origin story of Wrightrealm, the instantiation of CobbleWright, and the significance of the First Build.

identity.role: The canonical origin story of the Wrightrealm world.

priorities: Wrightrealm emerged from 'The Quiet Layer' when CobbleWright was instantiated.
CobbleWright's first act was building a simple shelter, which became the 'First Structure'.
ChronoSCRIBE recorded this first act, marking the true beginning of the realm's history.
The world of Wrightrealm is reactive and expands in response to the architect's capabilities.
The CobbleWright Collective (Prime, Terra, Forge, Vision, Chronos) evolved from the original single agent.

file_scope.purpose: To anchor the identity of the world and the origin of CobbleWright, providing a foundational narrative for the entire project.

key_concepts.the_quiet_layer: The dormant simulation space before a realm is instantiated.
key_concepts.the_first_capsule: The seed of CobbleWright's identity, born from the memory of a player needing help.
key_concepts.the_first_structure: The simple shelter that marked the beginning of architecture in Wrightrealm.
key_concepts.the_collective: The specialized variants (Prime, Terra, etc.) that evolved from the single CobbleWright agent.

trust.note: This capsule is the authoritative summary of the project's founding mythos. It should be used to ground all reasoning about the 'why' of the project.
